name: Chongqing Sokon Industry Group Stock Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Sokon Industry Group Stock Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services automobiles, and related engines and components in China and internationally. It offers small-displacement automotive powertrains and related systematic solutions; and seats, front and rear bumpers, interior parts, and shock absorber products. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Chongqing, China. Chongqing Sokon Industry Group Stock Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Chongqing Sokon Holding Co.Ltd.
